titleStmt.title: SII 15.97: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 97. (B.K. No. 104 of 1929-30.) MUTTAGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying on the proper right side of the Mallikārjuna temple.
This is dated Śaka 1080, Bahudhānya, Vaiśākha-puṇṇami, Monday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1158 A.D., April 14, Monday, f.d.t. °47. The eclipse occurred, however, on Tuesday.

It records the renewal by the king of the gift of the village Nāgahura in the kaṁpaṇa of Herbbāḷu Twelve to the god Śivaliṅga of Muttage, formerly bestowed by Chālukya Jagadēkamalla II. The gift was now renewed at the instance of Śrīdharadaṇḍanātha governing Tarddavāḍi-nāḍu and entrusted into the hands of the teacher Lakuḷīśa, the āchārya of the temple. The succession of these teachers is given as follows: Kāśmīradēva, his disciple Kālabhairava, his disciple Yōgīśvara; his disciple Dharēśvaradēva; and his disciple Yōgīśvaradēva, the guru of Lakuḷīśa. Muttage is described as an excellent agrahāra and the first town in the kaṁpaṇa of Muttage Thirty in the Tarddavāḍi-nāḍu. The record gives the genealogy of Śrīdhara-daṇḍanātha. It also records other gifts to the same deity by the Karaṇas of the above officer and Nāchiseṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . © svasti śrīmadaśēṣalōka
pradaṁ jñānavinyāsaṁ bhāsuranityani¨rmmaḷaparaṁjyōtisvarūpaṁ śivaṁ śasta śrī śivaliṁ nacaḷaṁ raṁji prastutyaṁ paripāḷikī bhuvana
maṁ caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ . śrīstanakuṁkumāruṇita raṁjitaśōṇamaṇiprabhāḷiyiṁ kaustubhamiṁdranīḷagiri dēvāḷi nēsaraṁ diṁde vakṣadoḷu ra
kṣipanaśēṣalōkapāḷastutya rakṣisugaśēṣajagaṁgaḷanella kēśavaṁ . śrīmattējōnidhānaṁ vimaḷataraparaṁjōtitatvasvarūpaṁ traimū¨rtti jñānamū¨rtti
tānaṁdamū¨rtti triḷōkasvāmi pratyakṣadaivaṁ divijagaṇanutaṁ viśvalōkaika nētraṁ byōmāḷaṁkāranutsāhamanakhiḷajagakkīge paṁkējamitraṁ .
śrīkaḷacuriyāṁnvayaratnākarasaṁvriddhikarasamudgatapū¨rnnasudhākarabiṁbaṁ negaḷdaṁ lōkaikastutyanenisi pe¨rmmāḍinripāḷakaṁ . śrī kaḷacu¨ryyavaṁśatiḷekaṁ
[pe¨rmmāḍi]dēvaṁ dharitrige rakṣā¨rtthade sākṣaradhvajane baṁdi¨rpaṁtiri¨rdaṁ suva¨rṇagavēṁdra dhvajanīdharāvaḷayamaṁ kāruṇyadiṁ pāḷisutta gajēṁdrāri parākramaṁ jananutaṁ śrī mā
na hēmācaḷaṁ . mahēśana ghōrānanadalli daḷḷisuṁ vugrābhīḷa lalāṭalōcanadurudgatamādudaṁtene
he¨rmmāḍidēvaṁge naṁdananī bijjaḷadēvanū¨rjjitayaśaṁ vairībhakaṁṭhīravaṁ baḷavadarā� vaṁśamahōdadhibhūmi kṣubhi
vanadahanadāvānaḷaṁ bijjalanṛpana rāmanoḷ . viśvadharitriyo
ḷaga baḷadibyāśvacayaṁgaḷaṁ madagajabrajamaṁ maṇibhūṣaṇaṁgaḷaṁ sāsvatamappa laṁkēśvarabhūbhuja
¨rpparu . vijita virōdhi dō¨rbbaḷadesagaṁ raṁga doḷāṁtarātibhūbhuja diśāgajanivahaṁbaraṁ nimi
doṁdagu¨rbbiniṁ bhujabhaḷacakrava¨rttivesaraṁ taḷedaṁ pratipakṣarākṣasaṁ . Enenegaḷdā bijjaladē guṇaniḷayaṁ sejjanaka¨rnna
pūranē sale manucaritaṁ śrīdharaṁ mahīdharadhai¨ryyaṁ . Ene saṁda paramadha¨rmmajñāna vipradēva mahimōṁnatiyeṁtene viśvarūpadiṁdaṁ vanajākṣaṁ tāne bijjaḷa
rūpāgi [niṁdaṁ .] śrīramaṇana nābhiya paṁkēruha catu¨rmmukhanīrēḷujagamana¨rtthiyiṁ paḍevaṁdu . muṁba
najamanadiṁ marīci kramadiṁ kaśyapamunīśa nanā [negaḷdhi¨rdda] kaśyapaṁ tāṁ paḍedī jagatrayamanādaradiṁ parirakṣisalke petta paru
taraṁ . Ā gaṇaṁgaḷoḷādi brahmana guṇaratnanidhivāk śrīdayitaṁ
negaḷdaṁ . Ā vibhuvina kulavadhu vākśrīvadhugaṁ dharaṇisutegaruṁdhatigaṁ śrī cāvuṁḍakabbe saṁmanade vasumati pogaḷe negaḷdaḷamaḷacaritre . negaḷdādaṁpatigaṁ
baṁdhubrātatūsaṁmige mitra[¨rnna]liyuttiral budhajanakkānaṁdemāgal spuṭaṁ jagatīcakradoḷāge sejjana puṭṭe vaṁdibrajaṁ
bagegoṁḍa¨rttiyināḍi pāḍi parasalgaṁgādharaṁ puṭṭidaṁ . naḍe manumā¨rggadoḷu deyānvitamopperaḍa¨rgge bēḷpudaṁ kuḍuva balpu taṁna maṟevokka
parōpakāramakhiḷajñate tatpaṁga mādudeṁdaḍe vibhugaṁga naṁneṟeye baṇniparā¨rvvimaḷāṁtaraṁganaṁ . Ī dhare baṇni salse gaḷda vautādgalagō
trapavitranappa gaṁgādharadaṁḍanāthana kulāṁgane jahnavidēviyaṁte puṇyādhike saccaritre bahuputra suni¨rmmaḷe jakkiyabbe vidyādharakaṁneyiṁ kara mecce
ne yaruṁdhativōl patibrate . puruṣā¨rtthada kaṇi gaṁgādharavibhugaṁ jakkiyabbegaṁ sutarā daru puruṣā¨rtthaṁgaḷe nālkuṁ nararūpaṁ taḷedu niṁdaṁnte vasumatiyoḷ .
mudadiṁ dha¨rmmame mū¨rttivettudenipaṁ śrī padmanābhaṁ jagadviditaṁ śrīdharadēvanujva ḷayeśaṁ śrīmanmahādēvanabhyudayānaṁdakaraṁ jagajjananutaṁ śrī ciṁdadēvaṁ guṇāspadaruṁ
nālvarumādarīkramadinā geṁgādharaṁgātmajar . padmaṁ sadamaḷa lakṣmīsadmaṁ mitra praha¨rṣaṁ padmōdbhavakuḷamānasapadma śrī padmanābhanapagatalōbhaṁ nayana
trayadiṁ gaurīpriyanesevantesayuti¨rdda trayadiṁdaṁ padmanābhadaṁḍādhīśaṁ . tadanujana vā¨ryyavī¨ryyaṁ sadamaḷaguṇaratna
bhūṣaṇaṁ sakaḷakaḷāspadanesedanakhiḷalakṣmīsadanaṁ śrīdharacamūpananupamarūpaṁ . piriyaṁ saubhāgyadiṁ sāhasadi yiṁ saṁda gōviṁdanallaṁ piriyaṁ sāma¨rtthya
diṁ vikramadinanupamaudā¨ryyadiṁ sau¨ryyadiṁdaṁ paramaisva¨ryyaprabhāvaṁ nijamenippā mahādēvanalliṁ piriyaṁ śrīsrīdharaṁ bhāsuraviśadayaśaṁ vi
pravidyādharēṁdraṁ . Avanīcakrakke bhāsvadyumaṇi kuvaḷayānaṁda viśrutamati bhūmige śrēṣṭhanā bhā¨rggavaniṁ śastrapravīṇaṁ
yamaniyama parā rāji nityōtsavaniṁdradhvajaṁ śrīdharane negaḷdaṁ vipra vaṁśābja haṁsaṁ . śāstrasakaḷāgama
kṛtiyoḷe śrīvāgdēvīpati di�diṁ śrīdharayyadaṁḍādhīsaṁ . pa�bhaktaṁ [�ci]dakṣanene kāruṇyadiṁ bi�lakṣiti�ḷaṁkuḍe pe�ttukuṁtaḷa�
kāṁtālasanmadhyasaṁsthitamappī vara ta¨rddavāḍiyananituṁ pāḷisuti¨rddanapratimaṁ śrīdhara daṁḍanāthanavanīcakraṁ manaṁgoḷvinaṁ . © Ā nāḍaṁ duṣṭanigra
ha śiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁ geyyutta dha¨rmmatatparacittenāgi © svasti samasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmat pratāpacakrava¨rtti jagadēkamalladēvar ta¨rdde vāḍināḍa baḷiya kaṁpaṇa muttage māvattara modalabāḍaṁ śrīmadu
ttamadagrahāraṁ muttageya śrī śivaliṁgadēva¨rgge Ā nāḍa baḷiya kaṁpaṇaṁ he¨rbbāḷu haṁnaraḍaṟoḷagaṇa nāgahuramuṁ kuḍalu dēvarāḷkeyāgi saluttire
© śrīmatkaḷacu¨rya bhujabaḷacakrava¨rtti tribhuvanamalla bi¨rjjaladēva¨rgge suprastāva doḷ śrīdharadaṁḍanāyakaṁ samastakaraṇaṁgaḷuṁ verasu biṁnapaṁgeydu Ā
nāgahuramaṁ muttageyumī śrī śivaliṁgadēva¨rgge puna¨rddattiyoge sa¨rbbanamasyavāgire tribhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhiyiṁ paḍedu . © svasti sakava¨rṣada 1080 neya ba
hudhānya saṁvatsarada vaiśākhada puṇnami sōmavāradaṁdina sōmagrahaṇa byatīpāta pa¨rbbanimittaṁ nāgahuramaṁ śrīśivaliṁgadēva¨rgge nivēdisi dēvaraṁga
bhōga naṁdādīvige nivēdya tapōdhanara ccātraraśanācchādana dēgulada maṭhada khaṁḍa sphuṭita navaka¨rmma ghaḷayūraṁ caitraṁ pavitraṁ pātrapāvuḷaṁga
ḷācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ salalu . Āsthānadācā¨ryya¨rpparamanaiṣṭhikaru śrīmat kāśmīra dēvara śiṣyaru vādimahāpraḷaya kālabhairava dēvaru .
Avara śiṣyaru yōgīśvaradēvaru . Avara śiṣyaru dharēsvaradēvaru . Avara śiṣyaru yōgī śvaradēvaru . Avara śiṣyaru . vri . sakaḷajñaṁ śivatatvavēdi manu
mādaṁtana cāritradiṁ sakaḷō¨rbbī vaḷayaṁ pavitrataremāyteṁbaṁnegaṁ mikka naiṣṭhikacūḍā maṇi lākuḷāgama sudhāṁbhōrāśitārādhipaṁ lakuḷīśabra
tiyeṁdu baṇnipudiḷābhāgaṁ manōrāgadiṁ . Eṁba hoga¨rtteyaṁ taḷedu . svasti yama niyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāna japasamādhiśīla saṁpanarappa .
śrīlakuḷīśapadaprakṣālanamaṁ māḍida keyiṁ taṁnaya kai mēlāge dhāreyeredaṁ līleyinī śrīdharayya daṁḍādhīśaṁ . śrīdharadaṁḍanāthanatibhaktisamanvita
cittanāgi ni¨rbbādhakamāge nāgahuramaṁ sale sa¨rbbanamasyamāgiralkī dhare baṇnipaṁttu śivaliṁga mahāmahimaṁge koṭṭanaṁbōdhi ravīṁdu bhūvaḷayamuḷḷinegaṁ sthiramāge rā
gadiṁ . śivadha¨rmmame dha¨rmmaṁ śrī śivaliṁga meṁdu ka¨rṇaṁgaḷumutsavadiṁde nāga huramaṁ bhuvanajanaṁ hogaḷe bhaktipū¨rbbakamittar . paramōtsāhadeThe letter va is written above the line.
bhaktipū¨rvvakadinitta¨rggāṇavoṁdaṁ dayāpararatyū¨rjjitapuṇyarujvaḷayaśa¨rssāhitya sa¨rvvajñarādaradiṁ śrīdharadēva mukhyakaraṇaṁgaḷ rājyadṛṣṭisvarūparu
mī yūroḍeya¨rmmahājanamumācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ salal . Ā¨ryya¨rnnispriharacaḷita dhai¨ryya¨rpparamā¨rtthatatvavidaranupamavāgvī¨rya ¨rnaiṣṭhikarani
pācā¨ryya¨rtāmā ḷkumī sthānakke . dharaṇīvallabharuṁ pradhānapuruṣa¨rddaṁḍā dhipa¨rnnāḍanāḷvarase¨rppe¨rggaḍegaḷ samastakaraṇaṁgaḷnāḍugaḷmattamī puradādi
prabhugaḷmahājanamumāraideṁdumī dha¨rmmamaṁ paripāḷippudu taṁmma dha¨rmmamidmutāṁ caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmmasētu¨rnripāṇāṁ
kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sa¨rvvānētānbhāginaḥ pā¨rtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . bahubhi¨rvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarā
dibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhūmitasya tasya tadāphalaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhi¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
śrī girijēśvaraṁge śivaliṁga mahāmahimaṁge bhaktiyiṁ nāgahurakke baṁdu tanagikkuva bīre vaṇaṁ niraṁtaraṁ tyāgamideṁdu koṭṭanuditō
ditakī¨rttiya nāciseṭṭi bhūbhāgadoḷiṁ niṁdaṁ pogaḷvaḍeṁtenali bakkumē . [Ī hu]radalli haḍuvaṇa bhāga dikka
ḷikeya holadiṁdaṁ mūḍalu bhāgavāgi sīmeya bāgiṁ teṁka dvijōttamavrittiyakeygaḷ .
Digital edition of SII 15.97 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
